title: Department Manager Vacancy at Bikanervala Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Bikanervala Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Bikanervala Advisory Limited in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bikanervala Advisory Limited:
Bikanervala Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bikanervala Advisory Limited!
